papers.title: Quantification of multi-stage recrystallization in low-alloy steel under varying deformation conditions using inhomogeneous-dislocation-density 3D cellular automaton
papers.paper_scope: Develop an inhomogeneous-dislocation-density 3D cellular automaton model to quantify multi-stage dynamic recrystallization and flow stress evolution in low-alloy steel under varying deformation conditions.

processes.description: Hot compression at constant temperature 850°C and strain rate 0.01 s^-1 to true strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 850°C at 10°C/s, held 60 s, compressed, water quenched.

processes.description: Hot compression at constant temperature 850°C and strain rate 1 s^-1 to true strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 850°C at 10°C/s, held 60 s, compressed, water quenched.

processes.description: Hot compression at constant temperature 950°C and strain rate 0.01 s^-1 to true strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 950°C at 10°C/s, held 60 s, compressed, water quenched.

processes.description: Hot compression at constant temperature 950°C and strain rate 0.1 s^-1 to true strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 950°C at 10°C/s, held 60 s, compressed, water quenched.

processes.description: Varying strain rate: first stage at 950°C, strain rate 0.01 s^-1 to strain 0.2, then transiently increased to 0.1 s^-1 and compressed to total strain 0.9.

processes.description: Varying strain rate: first stage at 950°C, strain rate 0.01 s^-1 to strain 0.4, then transiently increased to 0.1 s^-1 and compressed to total strain 0.9.

processes.description: Varying strain rate: first stage at 950°C, strain rate 0.1 s^-1 to strain 0.2, then transiently decreased to 0.01 s^-1 and compressed to total strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 950°C, held 60 s; first stage to ε=0.2 at 0.1 s^-1, second stage at 0.01 s^-1 to ε=0.9, water quenched.

processes.description: Hot compression at constant temperature 1050°C and strain rate 0.01 s^-1 to true strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 1050°C at 10°C/s, held 60 s, compressed, water quenched.

processes.description: Varying temperature: strain rate 0.01 s^-1, initial temperature 1050°C up to strain 0.2, then continuously decreased to 950°C in strain range 0.2-0.3, compressed to total strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 1050°C, held 60 s; deformed at 1050°C to ε=0.2, then temperature decreased to 950°C over Δε=0.1, further compressed to ε=0.9, water quenched.

processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 1050°C, held 60 s; deformed at 1050°C to ε=0.4, then temperature decreased to 950°C over Δε=0.1, further compressed to ε=0.9, water quenched.

processes.description: Varying temperature: strain rate 0.01 s^-1, initial temperature 950°C up to strain 0.2, then continuously increased to 1050°C in strain range 0.2-0.3, compressed to total strain 0.9.
processes.processes_notes: Heated to 1250°C at 10°C/s, held 180 s, cooled to 950°C, held 60 s; deformed at 950°C to ε=0.2, then temperature increased to 1050°C over Δε=0.1, further compressed to ε=0.9, water quenched.

processes.description: Varying temperature: strain rate 0.01 s^-1, initial temperature 950°C up to strain 0.4, then continuously increased to 1050°C in strain range 0.4-0.5, compressed to total strain 0.9.

processing_steps.processing_steps_notes: Transiently increase strain rate to 0.1 s^-1

structures.overall_structure: Partially recrystallized prior austenite microstructure after hot compression at 850°C, 0.01 s^-1, water quenched (martensite). Experimental DRX fraction ~79.3%, average grain size 34.01 ± 4.71 µm (side section).

phases_present.morphology: mixed: elongated unrecrystallized grains and equiaxed recrystallized grains
phases_present.grain_size: 34.01 µm (average, experimental side section), CA 3D: 34.53 µm

defects.dislocation_density: assumed initial 1e11 m^-2 uniform, inhomogeneous during deformation

grain_structure.grain_size_distribution: experimental side section 34.01 ± 4.71 µm, CA 2D: 32.94 µm

structures.overall_structure: Partially recrystallized prior austenite microstructure after hot compression at 850°C, 1 s^-1. Experimental DRX fraction ~42.8%, average grain size 61.38 ± 7.41 µm (side section).

phases_present.morphology: mixed, elongated matrix and few recrystallized grains

structures.overall_structure: Initial mixed-grain microstructure (as-homogenized at 1250°C) used as starting condition for all samples. Maximum grain size 265.20 µm, minimum 10.22 µm, average grain size in 2D ~140.01 µm (optical measurements).

phases_present.grain_size: average 140.01 µm (2D) / 143.78 µm (3D), max 265.20 µm, min 10.22 µm

grain_structure.grain_size_distribution: SD 51.88 µm (2D), Max 265.20 µm, Min 10.22 µm

characterization_methods.technique: Optical microscopy (Olympus-GX71) after etching with saturated picric acid solution
characterization_methods.purpose: Reveal prior austenite grain boundaries and measure grain size
characterization_methods.key_findings: Average grain size 34.01 ± 4.71 µm, DRX fraction 79.3%

characterization_methods.technique: EBSD (SU5000 SEM, step size 0.65-1.3 µm) and ARPGE reconstruction
characterization_methods.purpose: Reconstruct prior austenite grains from martensite, distinguish recrystallized grains using GOS threshold 3°
characterization_methods.key_findings: Reconstructed grain size agreed with optical measurement; maps showed incomplete recrystallization
Average grain size 61.38 ± 7.41 µm, DRX fraction 42.8%

characterization_methods.purpose: Reconstruct PAGs and identify DRX grains
characterization_methods.key_findings: Consistent with optical results; low recrystallization fraction
Max grain size 265.20 µm, min 10.22 µm, 2D average 140.01 µm

computational_details.simulation_method: 3D cellular automaton with inhomogeneous dislocation density, incorporating dislocation gradients and grain-boundary sliding
computational_details.software_used: In-house CA code, DEFORM 3D with Fortran user subroutines
computational_details.validation_against_experiment: Flow stress curves, DRX fraction evolutions, and average grain sizes compared with hot compression experiments under constant and varying conditions; RMSE of flow stress 3.3118 MPa, R² 0.9589; AGS RMSE 4.0169 µm, R² 0.9777; DRX fraction RMSE 0.0229, R² 0.9784.

analytical_model.model_name: Modified phenomenological constitutive model (WH+DRV+DRX) with stress softening coefficient k_s and varying t_0.5
analytical_model.equation_role: Calibrate dislocation accumulation/annihilation parameters and characteristic stresses for CA model; predict flow stress under varying conditions.
analytical_model.model_note: Incorporates effect of DRX history on saturation stress and time for 50% DRX fraction; validated by FEM.

unmapped_findings: Figure 7 presents experimental and simulated flow stress–strain curves at 850, 950, 1050, 1150 °C and strain rates 0.01–10 s⁻¹; specific yield/peak stress values are not digitized in the text, only curves are shown.
Figure 16 shows evolution of average grain size with transient variations; exact numerical values are not reported in the caption but indicate trends of grain size change.

Tables 6 and 7 provide simulated final grain sizes and volume fractions of first- and second-stage DRX grains under varying conditions; experimental counterparts are shown in figures but not tabulated.
The paper focuses on hot compression flow behavior, not on tensile properties; therefore no yield strength, UTS, or elongation values are reported in standard mechanical property format.
EBSD maps are used to reconstruct prior austenite grains and assess recrystallization fraction, with GOS threshold of 3°.
